title: GestureDetector for a plain tap
message: Your users wait longer for the screen when <GestureDetector> handles a simple tap.
help: Every GestureDetector sets up a native handler when it appears, which slows the screen. For a plain tap, use `<Pressable>` (or `createCSSAnimatedComponent(Pressable)` from react-native-reanimated/css for animated press feedback).
